description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light tan or camel-colored material, likely faux leather or microfiber. The sofa features a low-profile design with a continuous, gently contoured backrest and seat cushions that are subtly tufted, giving a plush yet streamlined appearance. The armrests are present only on the ends of the main seating section, with a straight, slightly flared profile and moderate height relative to the seat. The sofa sits on slender, black metal legs that are minimally visible, providing a floating effect and contemporary aesthetic. The seat cushions and backrest are attached and uniform in size, with a seamless transition between the main seating area and the chaise lounge extension. The overall look is clean, inviting, and well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, lounges, or modern living rooms.
description: A modern L-shaped tan sectional sofa with attached tufted cushions, low-profile backrest, and slim black metal legs. The design is sleek, plush, and ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise lounge extension on the left and the sofa's straight, padded armrest on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with both armrests visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite end, showing the main seating section and the armrest on the left, with the chaise lounge extending to the right.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full L-shape, attached tufted cushions, and both armrests, with the chaise lounge extending forward on the right.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five attached, uniform seat cushions and five attached back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout, with subtle tufting and no visible separation between seat and chaise sections.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests present only at the ends of the main seating section, moderately high relative to the seat, with a slightly flared profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and central support points, with a simple, exposed, and modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low to medium-height, continuous backrest with gentle contouring and attached, subtly tufted cushions, providing a seamless and unified appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid tan upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on both seat and back cushions, no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
